absorption: Son 10 bardaki 7-8 barda pozitif delta + ask_vol agir (319,212,120,100,68) olmasina ragmen fiyat 63943'ten 63935'e deginmis = ask absorption. Kurumsal satici emri yutuyor.
dom_observation: bid_ask_ratio 0.55 (<0.7) = satis baskisi dominan, ask_depth (93) bid_depth (52)'nin 1.79x yukarisi, DOM'da net satis baskisi.
htf_alignment: 5m/15m BULL vs 1h/4h BEAR = uyumsuzluk var. Ancak 4h bias + session sell dominant + CVD -4.8M = HTF BEAR lehine.
session_bias: buy_sell_ratio 0.78 (<0.8) + session delta -2.13M + sell_volume (9.5M) buy_volume'u (7.4M) basiyorsa = net session BEARISH momentum.
reasoning: Ask absorption (delta+ ama fiyat aynı kaliyor) + DOM satis baskisi (ratio 0.55) + session sell dominantligi (ratio 0.78) + HTF 1h/4h BEAR + negatif CVD = BEARISH price action.
